creator: include@npf.pt.freebsd.org
text:
Hello all

Sorry for the delay.

This mail is supposed to fiz two PR's:
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=111014
and
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=112012

so please, commit this patch and close these two PR's.

Thanks in advance
Francisco Alves Cabrita


diff -ruN joomla.orig/Makefile joomla/Makefile
--- joomla.orig/Makefile	Sat May  5 00:26:35 2007
+++ joomla/Makefile	Sat May  5 00:31:20 2007
@@ -7,8 +7,8 @@
  PORTNAME=	joomla
  PORTVERSION=	1.0.12
  CATEGORIES=	www
-MASTER_SITES=	http://forge.joomla.org/sf/frs/do/downloadFile/projects.joomla/frs.joomla_1_0.1_0_12/frs8162?dl=1/:source1
-DISTFILES=	${JOOMLA_SRC}:source1
+MASTER_SITES=   http://downloads.joomlacode.org/frsrelease/2/6/4/264/ 
+DISTFILES=     ${JOOMLA_SRC}

  MAINTAINER=	include@npf.pt.freebsd.org
  COMMENT=	A dynamic web content management system (CMS)
